args.text: Both services successfully patched: auth-api v5.8.4, session-store v2.2.9

args.subject: CVE-2026-30117: patching complete
args.body:
CVE-2026-30117 remediation is complete. Both affected services have been patched and verified:

- auth-api: v5.8.4
- session-store: v2.2.9

Credential rotation is in progress. All staff sessions will require re-establishment.

args.comment: Patching verified; proceeding to credential rotation.

args.text: Credential rotation completed: refresh tokens invalidated, signing keys rotated, old keys confirmed rejected.

args.subject: Please sign in again after tonight's security maintenance
args.body:
Following security maintenance tonight addressing CVE-2026-30117, all staff will need to sign in again. Your session has been invalidated as part of our security remediation.

Please log in with your credentials when you next access the system.

Thank you for your attention to this security matter.
